sources.title: Milenge Milenge 2007 Dv DRip Charme Leon Silver RG

metadata.Plot: Tarot Card Reader Sunita Rao informs Vasant Vihar-based idealist Priya Malhotra that she will meet her soulmate on a beach in a foreign country. While in Bangkok she meets Immy and believes he is the one--until she realizes that he wooed her by stealing her diary. She decides to test destiny by asking him to fulfill three conditions: to attend on the same floor of a hotel; to locate a book on numerology that contains her name and phone number; and asks him to write his contact details on a 50-Rupee note. She spends the money, and the book is left at a used bookstore. If both items are located by them, they truly are meant for each other. Immy is unable to locate her on any floor in the Hotel, and both re-locate--she to Mumbai and he to America. Three years later their marriages have been arranged with Sofiya Arora and Jatin, but neither is even close to locating the book or the 50 Rupee note.
metadata.Actors: Kareena Kapoor, Shahid Kapoor, Aarti Chhabria
